Description: Runs a command, see help for argument replacements
Title: Run Command

Options.Description:
Runs a command, substituting the strings... 
'{x}', '{y}', and '{z}' for the origin coordinates
'{radius}' with width/2, '{width}' with width, and '{height}' with height
'{var:<persistent variable name>} with the value of the persistent variable'
Options.Label: Command To Run
